Velvet Collection

Sumptuous velvet blazers and suits with rich, deep hues. Perfect for evening wear, galas, and luxury fashion lines.

Make It Yours

Customization Options

Every blazer and suit can be tailored to your brand's unique aesthetic. From fabric selection to hardware details.

✏

Private Label

Your branded labels, hang tags, and packaging. Full brand identity integration.

▤

Digital Printing

Custom prints, patterns, and artwork on any fabric. Unlimited color options.

◆

Embellishments

Gold/silver buttons, crystal hardware, chain trim, feather details, embroidery.

▦

Custom Sizing

Standard XS-3XL or custom size grading for your target market.

☘

Fabric Selection

Velvet, satin, crepe, tweed, wool, metallic, linen, vegan leather.

★

Embroidery

Monogram embroidery, logo stitching, decorative threadwork options.

Why Brands Choose Us

Manufacturing Excellence

🏆

Premium Materials

Italian velvet, silk satin, Merino wool, and Japanese tweed sourced from certified mills.

⚒

Expert Tailoring

20+ years of tailoring expertise with dedicated pattern makers and sample developers.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Samples in 5-7 days. Bulk production in 14-21 days. Air and sea shipping options.

📦

Low MOQ

Start with just 50 pieces per style. Perfect for emerging brands and limited drops.

Ready to Launch Your Blazer Line?

Get a free quote with sample pricing and production timeline. Our team is ready to bring your designs to life.
